_publications._publicationTitle: Programming of Schwann Cells by Lats1/2-TAZ/YAP Signaling Drives Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumorigenesis.

_contextSnippet: Following tamoxifen induction, Plp1-CreERT specifically and efficiently induced Tomato reporter expression in Krox20+ mature myelinating SCs in the adult peripheral nerves carrying a CAG-Tomato floxed-STOP allele
details: Plp1-CreERT specifically and efficiently induced Tomato reporter expression in Krox20+ mature myelinating SCs in adult peripheral nerves
